userMessage: I'm a freelance physiotherapist, 35 years old, I just opened my practice
assistantMessage:
As a freelance physiotherapist just starting your practice, you are particularly exposed to certain risks specific to your profession. The repetitive movements and working postures inherent to your job expose you to musculoskeletal disorders (MSDs), which are the leading cause of prolonged sick leave among physiotherapists. Without adequate income replacement, a work stoppage can quickly jeopardize the viability of your practice.

Your early-career situation reinforces the importance of solid income protection coverage. As a self-employed professional, your Social Security daily allowances are limited and subject to a waiting period. Disability income insurance guarantees you supplementary allowances from the first day of absence, thus preserving your income during recovery. Additionally, life insurance with adjustable capital protects your loved ones in the event of premature death.

MetLife offers solutions specifically designed for independent healthcare professionals like you. Our Super Novaterm contract provides flexible death protection, while our disability income coverage covers work stoppages and professional disability. I recommend speaking with a MetLife advisor to refine these recommendations.

risks.label: Prolonged work stoppage
risks.description: Without income replacement, a sick leave can jeopardize your practice in its early stages. Physiotherapists are particularly exposed to prolonged work stoppages.

risks.label: Professional disability
risks.description: MSDs are common among physiotherapists — a disability can permanently end your practice and your income.

risks.label: Premature death
risks.description: Protecting your loved ones in case of death is essential, especially early in your career with financial commitments related to your practice.

products.name: Super Novaterm
products.relevance: Life insurance tailored for self-employed professionals with adjustable capital based on your family situation and professional commitments.

products.name: Disability Income Protection
products.relevance: Daily allowances in case of work stoppage, essential for a freelance physiotherapist whose income depends directly on their activity.

partners.relevance: MSD prevention for healthcare professionals performing repetitive movements on a daily basis.
Administrative and accounting support for healthcare professionals starting their practice.
